name: Vulnerabilities: Vulnerability Reported by Scanner
notes: Detects when a vulnerability has been discovered on a local host.
conditions_text: when the event category for the event is one of the following VIS Host Discovery.New Vuln Discovered
TD_list: APPLY Vulnerabilities: Vulnerability Reported by Scanner on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following VIS Host Discovery.New Vuln Discovered
RED_list: Event name: Vulnerability Discovered on Local Host
Event description: A Vulnerability scanners has detected a vulnerability on a local host.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
